title: Bitter Fluffy Mediterranean Fennel Bulb Stir-fry
description: A lazy-sunday mediterranean dish featuring a fluffy and bitter fennel bulb, prepared with high-protein-friendly ingredients for added nutrition.
instructions: Trim the fennel bulb and cut into wedges. Rinse and dry.
Peel, chop the onion and garlic cloves.
Halve the tomatoes and set aside.
In a large bowl, mix olive oil with salt and pepper.
Add the fennel wedges to the bowl with olive oil mixture, ensuring they are evenly coated. Toss gently.
Place the fennel on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes until slightly caramelized and golden brown on top.
Meanwhile, heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add olive oil to the pan and when hot, add chopped onion and garlic.
Once onions are translucent and start to soften, add halved tomatoes and basil leaves. Stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes until tomatoes release their juices.
Add roasted fennel wedges to the wok or frying pan along with any accumulated juices from baking. Toss well to combine all ingredients.
Serve hot as a side dish or on its own as a light meal.
